releases.headline: Version 1 submission candidate
new: Operator Audit: audit recent local AI work after separate explicit approval and get five high-leverage next tasks
AGENTS.md Setup: create or improve the AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md your AI reads
Big Model Smell: simplify an over-engineered prompt, workflow, plan, or system
Workflow and SOP Builder: create a human-run, AI-assisted, automated, or combined process
Meeting Miner: turn one meeting into decisions, insight, communication feedback, and next actions
Customer Insight Synthesizer: find patterns across multiple customer evidence sources
Case Study Builder: turn one real customer or project result into credible proof
Daydreamer: find non-obvious connections across your own notes and work
Weekly Review: decide what moved, drifted, should stop, and matters next week
LLM Council: pressure-test a decision through independent analysis and peer review
Voice DNA: turn writing samples into a portable written-voice skill
Brand System Builder: turn visual taste and references into reusable design rules
Plain AI Explainer: explain a difficult AI concept so a smart beginner gets it
De-Slop: remove AI-writing tells without losing the writer's voice
Instagram Carousel Maker: turn one useful idea into an export-ready portrait carousel
HTML Slideshow: create and verify a responsive browser presentation
Digital Lead Magnet Maker: build a useful opt-in resource and its delivery copy
Content Refresher: update an existing asset while preserving useful proof and voice
Content Repurposing: transform one source into distinct channel-native assets
Offer Builder: define the buyer, promise, package, boundaries, price logic, and validation test
Landing Page CRO: improve the conversion path of an existing page
Content Performance: diagnose content results and choose evidence-based experiments
Digital Product Launch Builder: build a coordinated launch for a defined product
System powers: Start Here, Find a Power, What's New, Give Feedback, and Request a Power
improved: Six user-facing categories now organize all 28 powers
Weighted catalogue search favours explicit names and job phrases, respects negative triggers, and returns at most three results
Routing contracts and deterministic collision tests cover adjacent powers
All skill descriptions meet Anthropic's current 200-character metadata limit
Source and provenance ledger records the research basis for every new power
fixed: Customer research and feedback synthesis were merged into Customer Insight Synthesizer
Automation workflow and SOP creation were merged into Workflow and SOP Builder
privacy: Native skills do not send prompts, files, transcripts, or outputs to the update server
Feedback and requests require payload preview and explicit approval
Anonymous usage metrics use six fixed fields and have a documented off switch
knownLimitations: A marketplace refresh or new session may be required before an installed update appears
Anthropic's current Software Directory Policy conflicts with Operator Audit's local Claude and Codex history access even when separately approved
